description:
Product description: 

The lava lamp uses the heat generated by the bulb inside the base to melt the wax in the glass bottle, forming a wax ball that runs up and down. The melting time is related to the outside temperature.


Product information:
Light source type: incandescent lamp
Voltage: 110V (V)
Shade material: aluminum alloy
Dimensions: 330 (mm)
Style: modern
Average service life: 10000 (h)
Transformer: None
Lamp holder specifications: E14
Light source power: 25W (W)
Light color: clear water red wax, clear water blue wax, clear water green wax, clear water orange wax

Size Information:
33 cm high, 8.5 cm bottom diameter


Packing list:
Night light*1
